notes.author: Dr. Phong Le
notes.department: Primary Care (Charm City Asian Health Center)
notes.preview: Most recent annual visit. HTN/HLD at goal. CKD stage 3a stable (Cr 1.3, eGFR 47). Cholelithiasis — surgery deferred by patient. Brother died of lung cancer 3/2026. Shared decision-making about LDCT screening; patient declined again (cost). Continues NSAID use despite CKD counseling. Flu shot.

notes.author: Dr. Sandra Kim
notes.preview: Biliary colic. Two RUQ pain episodes after fatty meals. Abdominal US: multiple gallstones in distended GB, no acute cholecystitis. LFTs/lipase normal. Referred to General Surgery for elective lap chole; low-fat diet.

notes.author: Dr. Phong Le
notes.department: Primary Care (Charm City Asian Health Center)
notes.preview: Annual visit. Newly recognized CKD stage 2/3a (Cr 1.2, eGFR 47, 1+ proteinuria). NSAID counseling. Older brother just diagnosed with advanced lung cancer in Vietnam. Discussion of lung cancer screening — does not meet USPSTF; patient considering.

notes.author: Dr. Marcus Reilly
notes.preview: Pre-op evaluation for right TKA. KL grade 4 medial-compartment OA. Decade of conservative management exhausted. Surgery scheduled 4/12/2018.

notes.author: Dr. Phong Le
notes.department: Primary Care (Charm City Asian Health Center)
notes.preview: Annual visit. HTN well-controlled. New HLD (LDL 168) — started atorvastatin. Smoking cessation confirmed (quit 2004, ~14 pack-years lifetime). Latent TB infection — declined INH treatment again. Continuing 1–2 drinks/day.

notes.author: Dr. Karen O'Sullivan
notes.preview: Outpatient evaluation of positive PPD (14 mm) + positive QuantiFERON in a Vietnamese-born adult. CXR clear; sputum AFBs negative; cultures pending. Latent TB infection diagnosed. INH offered; patient declined given alcohol/monitoring burden.

notes.author: Dr. Phong Le
notes.department: Primary Care (Charm City Asian Health Center)
notes.preview: Establishing care after workplace TB screening returned positive (PPD 14 mm). Vietnamese immigrant, 1990. Newly identified HTN (BP 142/86). Current smoker 10 cig/day. Right knee OA suspected. Referred to ID/Pulm for LTBI workup.
